message:
fix: advertise only HTTP/1.1 in TLS ALPN (not h2)

HttpClient only has an HTTP/1.1 codec but alpn_http() advertised h2 as
preferred. When servers negotiate h2 (most modern HTTPS endpoints), the
connection breaks because the client cannot speak HTTP/2. Now advertises
only http/1.1 in ALPN.

Closes #12

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
